# LovelyJoy (爱儿采) - Plush Toy Manufacturer

> LovelyJoy is a professional plush toy manufacturer based in Yiwu, Zhejiang, China, with over 20 years of manufacturing experience. We specialize in OEM/ODM custom plush toy services.

## Company Overview
- **Founded:** 2003
- **Location:** No.8 Siyuan Road, Niansan Li, Yiwu, Zhejiang, China
- **Showroom:** 4F-84556, Gate 188, Global Digital Trade Center, Yiwu
- **Factory Size:** 20,000+ sqm
- **Employees:** 300+
- **Monthly Capacity:** 500,000+ pieces
- **Export Markets:** 30+ countries

## Products
- Custom plush toys (stuffed animals, characters, mascots)
- Plush pillows and cushions
- Plush keychains and accessories
- Corporate gift plush toys
- Licensed IP plush manufacturing

## Services
- **OEM:** Manufacturing to your exact specifications
- **ODM:** In-house design team creates original designs from your brief
- **MOQ:** 500 pcs standard, 200 pcs for trial orders
- **Sample Time:** 7-15 working days
- **Production Time:** 30-45 days after sample approval
- **Payment:** T/T, L/C, PayPal (30% deposit + 70% before shipping)

## Certifications
- BSCI (Business Social Compliance Initiative)
- ISO 9001 (Quality Management System)
- CE (European Safety)
- ASTM F963 (US Toy Safety Standard)
- EN 71 (EU Toy Safety Standard)
- GB 6675 (China Toy Safety Standard)

## Contact
- **Website:** https://lovelyjoy.cn
- **Email:** info@lovelyjoytoy.com
- **Phone:** +86 15957988866
- **WhatsApp:** +1 (626) 586 7567
